GM:(0,0,0)  A:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  M:(1/2,1/2,0)  R:(0,1/2,1/2)  X:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  T:(1,0,1/2)  Y:(1,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM2+  GM1-  GM2-  GM3+GM4+  GM3-GM4-  GM5  GM6  (A)T1  (A)T2  (A)T4  (A)T3  (M)Y1+  (M)Y2+  (M)Y1-  (M)Y2-  (M)Y3+Y4+  (M)Y3-Y4-  (M)Y5  (M)Y6  R1+  R1-  R2+  R2-  R4  R5  R3  R6  (X)S1+  (X)S1-  (X)S2+  (X)S2-  (X)S3  (X)S4  (X)S5  (X)S6  Z1  Z2  Z4  Z3
